title: [Snyk Code] Hardcoded Non-Cryptographic Secret
description:
## Hardcoded Non-Cryptographic Secret

**Severity:** low
**Project:** `AnthusAI/Plexus`
**File:** `plexus/dashboard/api/client_test.py`
**Location:** line 48, column 9 to line 48, column 16
**Classes:** CWE-CWE-547
### Snippet (plexus/dashboard/api/client_test.py:46-50)
```
  46 |     client = PlexusDashboardClient(
  47 |         api_url='https://test.api',
  48 |         api_key='test-key'
  49 |     )
  50 |     assert client.api_url == 'https://test.api'
```

**Issue Key:** dc214631-4f38-4edb-98f9-6fc6c2008571

### Details
Hardcoded Non-Cryptographic Secret

**Fix:** Review and remediate in code.
